Package org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.model.bpmn.instance

Interface CallActivity

All Superinterfaces:
Activity, BaseElement, BpmnModelElementInstance, FlowElement, FlowNode, InteractionNode, ModelElementInstance
All Known Implementing Classes:
CallActivityImpl
public interface CallActivity extends Activity
The BPMN callActivity element
Author:
Sebastian Menski
